hero.title: Human Rights and Child Protection
hero.subtitle: Strengthening rights in the coffee-growing chain
hero.description: Strengthen the respect, protection and guarantee of human rights with an emphasis on preventing child labor in Honduras' RS GOLD chain.

personas.label: People to be trained
personas.sub: in Human Rights and Child Labor

timeline.title: Program action plan
timeline.description: Six work areas covering prevention, monitoring, remediation and capacity building in coffee-growing communities in Honduras.

espaciosSeguros.title: 3 Safe Spaces
espaciosSeguros.desc: Implementation in Comayagua, Santa Bárbara and Yoro — protected environments for coffee-growing children and youth during harvest.

monitoreo.title: Child Labor Monitoring
monitoreo.desc: 1 active monitoring system. 100% of identified cases receive at least 2 documented follow-up visits.

capacitados.title: 450 People Trained
capacitados.desc: Training in Human Rights and Child Labor aimed at technical teams, producers, workers, families, youth and children.

kits.title: 86 School Kits
kits.desc: Educational materials to strengthen the right to education for children in intervention areas.

protocolo.title: Protection Protocol
protocolo.desc: 1 child protection and remediation protocol developed and shared with the entire RS GOLD producer community.

articulacion.title: Interinstitutional Coordination
articulacion.desc: Work with government institutions and CSOs to ensure response to identified cases.

map.title: Intervention departments
map.description: The program operates in the main coffee-growing departments of Honduras where the RS GOLD chain develops, prioritizing communities with the highest vulnerability and risk of child labor.
map.objectiveText: Strengthen the respect, protection and guarantee of human rights, with an emphasis on preventing child labor and improving working conditions in the RS GOLD value chain, through comprehensive prevention, monitoring and remediation actions.

gallery.title: Program moments
gallery.description: Images of fieldwork with communities, children and coffee-growing families in Honduras.
gallery.dragHint: Drag the photos to rearrange them
